name: Tee-To-Green Golf Center
address: Self Serve Driving Range and Mini Golf OPEN DURING THE DAY ALL YEAR ROUND, 2011 Montour Blvd, Danville, PA 17821
about: Tee-To-Green Golf Center is a multi-facility venue featuring a golf simulator, a full-flight driving range, an 18-hole mini-golf course, and a lounge with billiards and shuffleboard. The facility offers automated systems for the driving range and mini-golf, with no explicit mention of on-site food service, though it is BYOB friendly. Pricing is provided for simulator rentals, driving range buckets, and mini-golf rounds. The venue is suitable for casual play, group events, and individual practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Wide variety of activities including driving range, mini-golf, and simulator
BYOB policy offers flexibility for a relaxed social environment
Automated systems for driving range and mini-golf provide convenience
Suitable for hosting parties and events with multiple entertainment options

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Clubs are provided free of charge for the driving range and are available for simulator use. BYOB is friendly.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) friendly.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round of mini-golf take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole round is not specified, but it is available for $9 per round.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue features an 18-hole miniature golf course and is described as suitable for parties for all ages.
